title: Selling Courses Without Teachable or Gumroad: An Honest Side-by-Side Breakdown — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: Are you a digital creator from Nigeria trying to sell online courses without getting blocked by Teachable or Gumroad's country restrictions? Do you struggle to find a payment solution that doesn't require a PayPal account, leaving you frustrated and losing potential sales? You're not alone. Many creators face this challenge due to geo-restrictions, banking limitations, or Know-Your-Customer (KYC) requirements. This article will provide an honest side-by-side breakdown of your options, helping you discover a reliable alternative to sell your courses without relying on PayPal or Stripe. By the end of this article, you'll know how to get started with selling your online courses without any hassle, even with the most restrictive payment platforms.
What Each Option Actually Offers

When it comes to selling online courses, Teachable and Gumroad are popular choices. They offer a range of features such as course creation tools, payment processing, and marketing integrations. However, they come with a catch – country restrictions. If you're from a restricted country like Nigeria, you won't be able to use their services without a VPN or a workaround. This is where alternatives like Unchained Commerce come in. Unchained Commerce offers a range of products, including the Admin Dashboard, which provides essential tools for managing transactions and orders. Their products are designed to be user-friendly, even for those with limited technical expertise.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to handling restricted countries, Teachable and Gumroad have strict policies in place. They block access to their services for users from certain countries, citing regulatory compliance and risk management as the reasons. This can be frustrating for creators who rely on these platforms for their income. In contrast, Unchained Commerce is designed to be more inclusive, with no country restrictions or KYC requirements. This means you can sell your online courses to anyone, anywhere in the world, without worrying about being blocked.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, Teachable and Gumroad charge varying rates depending on the plan you choose. They also have different payment processing fees, which can range from 2.9% + 30 cents per transaction to 3.5% + 30 cents per transaction. Unchained Commerce offers a more transparent pricing model, with a one-time payment of $29.99 for the Admin Dashboard. This means you don't have to worry about recurring fees or hidden charges. Plus, their payment processing fees are lower, at just 1.5% per transaction.
Unchained Commerce offers a more transparent pricing model, with no recurring fees or hidden charges.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

When it comes to automation and delivery capabilities, Teachable and Gumroad have limited options. They require you to manually deliver course materials to students, which can be time-consuming and inefficient. Unchained Commerce, on the other hand, offers automated delivery capabilities, which allow you to set up custom delivery workflows for your courses. This means you can focus on creating content, rather than manually delivering it to students.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So, which platform should you choose based on your situation? If you're looking for a reliable alternative to Teachable or Gumroad, with no country restrictions or KYC requirements, Unchained Commerce is the way to go. Their products, including the Admin Dashboard, are designed to be user-friendly and affordable, making it easy to get started with selling your online courses. Plus, their automated delivery capabilities and lower payment processing fees make it a more cost-effective option in the long run.
